card.name: Outcrop Scout
card.text: When this creature enters, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.") {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Novice Mechanic
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle token with crew 1. (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: That Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Perimeter Defense
card.text: Refine 2 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile two cards from your graveyard.) Create two 1/1 white Warrior creature tokens. Then if this spell was refined, those tokens gain indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Extraction Jockey
card.text: Refine 3 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile three cards from your graveyard.) When this creature enters, if it was refined, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Surveyor's Hoverrod
card.text: Flying When this Vehicle enters, surveil 1, then draw a card. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Withering Sproutgrower
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature dies, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Fume Inspector
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Duststorm Remnant
card.text: As long as you control a Desert, or there is a Desert card in your graveyard, this creature has menace.

card.name: Extract Essence
card.text: Refine 3 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile three cards from your graveyard.) Destroy target creature, Vehicle, or planeswalker. If this spell was refined, you gain life equal to that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Underhanded Exchange
card.text: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token.

card.name: Oppressive War Machine
card.text: Menace When this Vehicle enters, target creature or Vehicle you control gains indestructible until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Divest
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose an artifact or creature card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Salvage Reaper
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, return target creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to your hand. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Luxury Life Support
card.text: Refine 2 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile two cards from your graveyard.) If this spell was refined, you may cast it as though it had flash. Enchant creature or Vehicle Enchanted permanent gets +1/+1 and has "When this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return it to its owner's hand."

card.name: Economic Incentive
card.text: Kicker—Sacrifice an artifact (You may sacrifice an artifact in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Draw two cards. If this spell was kicked, you gain 2 life. Otherwise, you lose 2 life.

card.name: Redline Duo
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Mobile Bike
card.text: Haste When this Vehicle enters, create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Heavy Truck
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Exotics Gatherer
card.text: Vigilance As long as you control a Desert, or there is a Desert card in your graveyard, this creature gets +1/+1.

card.name: Fertile Colossus
card.text: When this creature enters, harvest, then put a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature card in your graveyard. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.) This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Road War
card.text: Choose target creature or Vehicle you control and target creature or Vehicle you don't control. Each Vehicle chosen this way becomes an artifact creature until end of turn, then those creatures fight. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Armored Transport
card.text: Trample When this Vehicle enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature or Vehicle. It gains trample until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Mobile Home
card.text: Reach When this creature enters, you may exile a card from your graveyard. If you do, you gain life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Drillmonger Transport
card.text: Lifelink {T}: Add {W} or {B}. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Motorbrain
card.text: Overdrive 2 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on it.)

card.name: Nullifying Barge
card.text: Flash When this Vehicle enters, counter target spell. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Moldpipe Tender
card.text: When this creature enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: March of the Dead
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Desert you control and each Desert card in your graveyard. Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Reckless Firebrand
card.text: Haste Overdrive 1 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Raider's Blastdriver
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, it deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Start Your Engines
card.text: Vehicles you control become artifact creatures until end of turn. Creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Waste Scavenger
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, those tokens plus an additional Food token are created instead. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") {1}, Sacrifice two tokens: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Industrial Menace
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, choose one— • Destroy target artifact or enchantment. • Put a +1/+1 counter on this Vehicle, then create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") Crew 2

card.name: Extract from Soil
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a land or pay {2}. Search your library for two basic land cards and/or Desert cards and put them onto the battlefield tapped. Then shuffle.

card.name: Farlands Probe
Contested Freeway
card.text: When this land enters, create a tapped Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Onsite Technician
card.text: Overdrive 1 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, you may return to your hand up to one target artifact or creature card in your graveyard with lesser mana value than the sacrificed permanent. If you don't, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Merry Mercenaries
card.text: Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target attacking creature. Whenever you attack with two or more creatures, draw a card. Whenever you attack with three or more creatures, you may return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Drastic Terraforming
card.text: Refine 4 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile four cards from your graveyard.) If this spell was refined, target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. Destroy all creatures.

card.name: Tavre, Eon Witness
card.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, you may exile it and each Memory you control. If you do, create a token that's a copy of the exiled card, except it's a Memory in addition to its other types. Stockpile — {2}{G}: Return Tavre from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only if you control three or more tokens and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Sphinx of the Sacred Source
card.text: Flying Stockpile — At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control three or more tokens, up to one target token you control becomes a 5/5 Elemental creature with flying in addition to its other types.

card.name: Mobile Manufactory
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, manufacture that many times. (To manufacture, create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Sievesight
card.text: Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand, then put another one of them into your hand if you control a Desert, then put another one of them into your hand if there is a Desert card in your graveyard. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Grease Jockey
card.text: Refine X (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile any number of cards from your graveyard.) This creature has flying as long as a face up creature or Vehicle card you own in exile has flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, vigilance, and ward.

card.name: Geryuth's Culling
card.text: When this enchantment enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.) If you would harvest, you may instead discard a card. When you do, target opponent loses half their life, rounded up.

card.name: Kylie, Restoration Expert
card.text: When Kylie, Restoration Expert enters, create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1. {2}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return target artifact card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Acceleration Fanatic
card.text: Haste Overdrive 1 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Whenever you sacrifice a permanent during combat on your turn, untap each creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Weapons Manufacturing
card.text: Whenever a nontoken artifact you control enters, create a colorless artifact token named Munitions with "When this token leaves the battlefield, it deals 2 damage to any target."

card.name: Smelting Station
card.text: {T}: Manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.) {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Draw a card. {T}, Discard a card: Create a Weapon token. You may attach it to a creature you control. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.)

card.name: Dustdevil Hydra
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Desert you control and each Desert card in your graveyard. This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When this creature enters, you may have it fight target creature you don't control.

card.name: Communal Cultivator
card.text: Whenever this creature or another nontoken creature you control enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Damway Defender
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Stockpile — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you control three or more tokens, put X +1/+1 counters on this creature, where X is its power.

card.name: Z.O.G., the Lost Breakthrough
card.text: When Z.O.G., the Lost Breakthrough enters, create two Weapon tokens. Then you may attach any number of Auras and Equipments you control to Z.O.G. (Weapons are Equipment artifacts with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.) Whenever Z.O.G. attacks, it deals damage to any target equal to the number of permanents attached to it.

card.name: Lich's Mirror
card.text: If you would lose the game, instead shuffle your hand, your graveyard, and all permanents you own into your library, then draw seven cards and your life total becomes 20.

card.name: Starkissed Mesa
card.text: This land enters tapped unless there are three or more other Desert cards among lands you control and land cards in your graveyard. {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Extraction Site
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}. {X}{W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Mill X cards, you may put a card milled this way into your hand. You gain X life.

card.name: Ground Zero Sentry
card.text: Flying You may cast this card from exile as long as you own seven or more cards in exile. When this creature enters, if it wasn't cast from your hand, put a +1/+1 counter and a vigilance counter on it.

card.name: Siglar, On a New Road
card.text: [+1]: You may create Odrvegr, a legendary 4/3 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 2. If you don't, create a Fuel token. [-2]: You may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, Siglar deals 4 damage to any target. [-6]: All Vehicles you control become artifact creatures until until end of turn. Then, creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain trample and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Ichor Terror
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each noncreature card in your graveyard and each noncreature card you own in exile.

card.name: Extractor Technician
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. You may put a card with mana value 3 or less from among the cards milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Vinepillar Steward
card.text: When this creature enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.) Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Back from the Boneyard
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put two +1/+1 counters, a trample counter, and a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Worldly Salvage
card.text: Surveil 2, then return a card from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Worldly Salvage. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Rubblefarmer Transport
card.text: Deathtouch {T}: Add {B} or {G}. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Hydrotect Transport
card.text: Trample {T}: Add {G} or {U}. Crew 6 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 6 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Slagsmith Transport
card.text: Flying {T}: Add {U} or {R}. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Gearhead Transport
card.text: As long as it's your turn, this Vehicle has first strike. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Mirage Mesa
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Derelict Refinery
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Derelict Greenhouse
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Derelict Dam
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Derelict Factory
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Derelict Garage
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Bloodsaw Thresher
card.text: Overdrive 1 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has menace. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: The Hammer, Slagnum Opus
card.text: When The Hammer enters, manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.) Whenever one or more artifact tokens you control enter, you may draw that many cards. If you do, discard a card. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Wellspring Outpost
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. {1}{G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a Water token, a Food token, and a Fuel token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Industrial Bowels
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {3}{U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The One That Got Away
card.text: Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then you may put a permanent card with mana value less than or equal to the number of tokens you control from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Aquiscape Patrol
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. Stockpile — Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, if you control three or more tokens, draw a card.

card.name: Harrier Vulture
card.text: Flying Stockpile — When this creature enters, put a stun counter on target artifact or creature you don't control. If you control three or more tokens, also tap that permanent.

card.name: Hydroblade Warrior
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") This creature gets +1/+0 for each token you control.

card.name: Sand Crab
card.text: Defender (This creature can't attack.) As long as you control a Desert or there is a Desert card in your graveyard, this creature can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Dry Out
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}. If that spell is a creature or planeswalker spell, create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Repel the Raiders
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.)

card.name: Adaptable Armaments
card.text: Up to one target creature gains hexproof until end of turn. Create a Weapon token. You may attach it to that creature. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.)

card.name: Lost Valley Scavenger
card.text: When this creature enters, create a tapped Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Infested Howlers
card.text: Deathtouch {2}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a deathtouch counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Colossal Snapjaw
card.text: Stockpile — As long as you control three or more tokens, this creature gets +1/+1 and has trample.

card.name: Oasis Seeker
card.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a basic land card or a Desert card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. {U}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Well-Oiled Machine
card.text: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature or Vehicle. Stockpile — If you control three or more tokens, put three +1/+1 counters on that permanent instead.

card.name: Into the Wasteland
card.text: Search your library for a basic land card or a Desert card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.")

card.name: Scuttle
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. {3}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Ambush Chameleon
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") Stockpile — Whenever this creature attacks, if you control three or more tokens, it gains flying and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Hydrovault Security
card.text: Stockpile — As long as you control three or more tokens, you may cast this spell as though it had flash. Reach

card.name: Psycraft
card.text: Choose one— • Return target creature to its owner's hand. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Fertility Probe
card.text: Vigilance {1}{U}, {T}: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Supply Drone Support
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Drone artifact creature token with flying, then manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Savvy Salvager
card.text: When Savvy Salvager enters, create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") {2}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact or land: Draw a card.

card.name: Left to Rust
card.text: Tap target creature or vehicle and put three stun counters on it. Manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Steelcast
card.text: Affinity for artifact creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact creature you control.) Draw two cards.

card.name: Uncharted Voyage
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library. Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Wayless Dunetreader
card.text: As long as you control a Desert, or there is a Desert card in your graveyard, this creature gets +1/+0.

card.name: Relentless Pathcarver
card.text: Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Whenever this creature attacks, another target creature you control gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Dilapidated Colossus
card.text: Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.) This creature can only attack and block alone.

card.name: Basic Manufacturing
card.text: Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token, then manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Stoked
card.text: Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.) Enchant creature or Vehicle When this Aura enters, create a Weapon token and attach it to enchanted creature. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.) Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has trample.

card.name: Overclock
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn. • Target artifact creature you control gets +3/+1 and gains first strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Scrap for Parts
card.text: Destroy up to one target artifact. Manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Perimeter Drones
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, surveil 1.

card.name: Slagsmith Welder
card.text: When this creature enters, draw a card, then discard a card, then draw a card. {U}{R}, {T}: Target artifact creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Untap it.

card.name: Unstable Ordinance
card.text: Unstable Ordinance deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If excess damage was dealt this way, draw a card.

card.name: Hammer's Reinforcement
card.text: When this creature enters, if it isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Exploration Apparatus
card.text: When this creature dies, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.")

card.name: Convoy Float
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this Vehicle attacks, untap up to one target creature. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Veteran Skyraider
card.text: Flying, vigilance Overdrive 1 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: Siphon Essence
card.text: Destroy target attacking or blocking creature. If an artifact creature was destroyed this way, create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.")

card.name: Combat Crash
card.text: Kicker—Sacrifice an artifact. (You may sacrifice an artifact in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell.) Target creature or Vehicle gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If this spell was kicked, that permanent gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Guzzlefreak Bandit
card.text: {W}: Untap this creature. Activate only once each turn and only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bronzetown Bruiser
card.text: Overdrive 1 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on it.) This creature has trample as long as it has a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Claim Ownership
card.text: Gain control of target artifact or creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.")

card.name: Visions of Combustion
card.text: You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. Create a tapped 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact creature token with crew 1. (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: That Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Sandscorched Surveyor
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice one or more permanents, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. At the beginning of your end step, you may move a counter from Sandscorched Surveyor onto another target permanent you control.

card.name: Road Ready
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact for each target beyond the first. Any number of target creatures each get +3/+1 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Kingpin Comissioner
card.text: As long as it's your turn, this creature has first strike. When this creature enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. Attacking creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Salvage Field
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. When this land is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you may search your library for a basic Mountain Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Cultivated Ruins
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}. Whenever you gain life, you may return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

card.name: Crocus, Rations Expert
Seasoned Fuelseeker
card.text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) {B}, {T}: Mill two cards.

card.name: Overexertion
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature When this Aura enters, tap enchanted permanent and draw a card. Whenever enchanted permanent becomes tapped, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Ride or Die
card.text: Choose one — • Create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact creature token with crew 1 and a 1/1 white Warrior creature token. (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: That Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.) • Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Oilkin Pumpmonger
card.text: Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.) When this creature enters, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.")

card.name: Catalytic Oilkin
card.text: Whenever this creature enters the battlefield or leaves your graveyard, create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.")

card.name: Bore In
card.text: Refine 3 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile three cards from your graveyard.) Destroy target creature if its power is 3 or less or if this spell was refined.

card.name: Read the Sands
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle Enchanted permanent gets +1/+1. As long as you control a Desert or there is a Desert card in your graveyard, you may cast this Aura from your graveyard.

card.name: Oil Baron's Enforcer
card.text: When this creature enters, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. If you don't, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.")

card.name: Sturdy Dunetreader
card.text: Vigilance When this Vehicle enters, creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Frail Corvid
card.text: Flying Whenever you gain life, Frail Corvid gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Reclamation Witness
card.text: When this creature enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.) {1}{G}, Sacrifice a token: Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Starve Out
card.text: Kicker {1} (You may pay an additional {1} as you cast this spell.) Destroy target creature, Vehicle, or planeswalker. If this spell was not kicked, each opponent harvests. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Weighted Demands
card.text: Each opponent sacrifices a creature or Vehicle. If a token was sacrificed this way, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Corpsebay Boss
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) When this creature dies, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Corpse Cage
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature or Vehicle you control must be blocked this turn if able. • Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") • Corpse Cage deals 5 damage to target creature with flying.

card.name: Timberdust Hermit
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Oasis Guide
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Hydrotect Toolsmith
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may pay {1}{GU}. When you do, you create a Water token, then target creature or Vehicle gains trample until end of turn. (A Water is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: Bubblewise Mentor
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 2 or less, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Each creature you control with mana value 2 or less enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Domesticated Megamoth
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature, it gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Barrel Drinker
card.text: Flying Stockpile — This creature gets +1/+1 as long as you control three or more tokens.

card.name: Hydrotect Surveyor
card.text: Whenever Hydrotect Surveyor attacks, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't put the card onto the battlefield, put it into your hand. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Secure Refuge
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") Whenever a spell or ability you control untaps a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. Whenever a spell or ability you control taps a creature, put a stun counter on that creature.

card.name: Drone Surveillance Network
card.text: When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 colorless Drone artifact creature token with flying. Whenever one or more artifact creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, surveil 1. At the beginning of your end step, if three or more artifact creatures you control dealt combat damage to players this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Weathered Sentry
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one other target creature to its owner's hand.

card.name: Reservoir Constrictor
card.text: Flash Affinity for tokens (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each token you control.) When this creature enters, tap it and up to one target artifact or creature you don't control. Put a stun counter on the permanent you don't control. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Dune Wind Deflection
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Desert or there is a Desert card in your graveyard. Counter target spell.

card.name: Moisture Extractor
card.text: When this artifact enters, draw a card and create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") Stockpile — At the beginning of your end step, if you control three or more tokens, return this artifact to its owner's hand.

card.name: Anima Awakener
card.text: Whenever you attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature.

card.name: Wellspring Guard
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") Stockpile — Whenever you attack, if you control three or more tokens, creatures you control gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Dam Dismantler
card.text: Trample, reach When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a token. If you do, it fights another target creature.

card.name: Resourceful Crafting
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle Whenever enchanted permanent attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, return target non-Aura permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Hoverforce Agent
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a Weapon token and attach it to this creature. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.)

card.name: Scrapyard Apparition
card.text: Flying {3}{U}: Manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Thirst for Knowledge
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an artifact card.

card.name: Speed Freak
card.text: Haste Whenever this creature becomes tapped, if it wasn't tapped to crew a Vehicle, put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Blade Crawler
card.text: Menace When this creature dies, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.)

card.name: Forgeworks Operator
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one— • Create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. • Manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.) Whenever one or more artifacts you control enter, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Searing Dunes
card.text: Searing Dunes deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is 2 plus the number of Deserts you control and/or Desert cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Slagsmith Toolsmith
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may pay {1}{UR}. When you do, create a Weapon token, then target creature or Vehicle gains flying until end of turn. (A Weapon is an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.)

card.name: Glintscale Smith
card.text: Vigilance When this creature enters, scry 2, then exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may cast artifact cards exiled this way.

card.name: Fleshhulker
card.text: Affinity for artifact creatures (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact creature you control.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, target artifact creature you control gains vigilance and menace until end of turn.

card.name: Construct Conductor
card.text: Whenever you create one or more tokens, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target artifact becomes an X/X artifact creature until end of turn, where X is the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Slagsmith B.O.L.T.
card.text: Haste When this Vehicle enters, create a Fuel token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") Attacking artifact creatures you control get +1/+0. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Reassembly Station
card.text: When this artifact enters, create a 1/1 colorless Construct artifact creature token and a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {1}.) {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Manufacture. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Encroaching Desert
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Enigmatic Engineer
card.text: As long as it's your turn, each permanent you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has first strike. {W}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature or Vehicle you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Waterhole Witness
card.text: Lifelink When this creature enters, return up to one target permanent card with mana value 1 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Husked Redeemer
card.text: Vigilance Overdrive 2 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on it.) When this creature dies, return another target non-Cleric creature or Vehicle card with mana value less than or equal to this creature's power from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Leave no Trace
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you pay {2} more to cast it. Choose one — • Exile target noncreature, nonland permanent. • Exile target tapped creature.

card.name: Mechanical Upgrades
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle When this Aura enters, put up to one +1/+1 counter on enchanted permanent and draw a card. Enchanted permanent gets +1/+1 for each counter on it.

card.name: Guzzlefreak Soloist
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. When this creature dies, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Mobile Drivestoker
card.text: Overdrive 2 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on it.) Whenever this creature attacks, if it has one or more +1/+1 counters on it, you may discard your hand and remove any number of +1/+1 counters from it. If you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Vehicular Manslaughter
card.text: Create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact creature token with crew 1. It becomes an artifact creature and gains haste until end of turn. Then Vehicular Manslaughter deals damage to each other creature and each planeswalker equal to the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: Gearhead Toolsmith
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may pay {1}{RW}. When you do, create a Fuel token, then target creature or Vehicle gains first strike until end of turn. (A Fuel is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.")

card.name: Gearhead Sandspeaker
card.text: During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever you sacrifice another permanent, surveil 1. If this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card instead.

card.name: Skyblazer
card.text: Flying, haste Overdrive 2 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put two +1/+1 counters on it.)

card.name: From the Wreckage
card.text: Enchant creature or Vehicle you control Enchanted permanent gets +2/+0 and has menace. When enchanted permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return it to the battlefield under its owners control.

card.name: Blade-Wheel Buggy
card.text: Trample Overdrive 4 (When this creature attacks, if it has no +1/+1 counters on it, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put four +1/+1 counters on it.) At the beginning of each end step, remove all counters from Blade-Wheel Buggy. Crew 1

card.name: Witness Me!
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Lifelink (Damage dealt by this spell also causes you to gain that much life.) Witness Me! deals damage to any target equal to the sacrificed creature's power.

card.name: Combustuble Sludge
card.text: Haste This creature can't be blocked except by Vehicles. {T}, Sacrifice this creature: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Corpse Beast
card.text: Whenever one or more creature cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Scavenging Monkeys
card.text: When this creature enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.) Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Barren Wurm
card.text: This creature gets +1/+1 for each Desert you control and each Desert card in your graveyard. As long as you control a Desert and there is a Desert card in your graveyard, this creature has trample and reach.

card.name: Rubblefarmer Toolsmith
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may pay {1}{BG}. When you do, create a Food token, then target creature or Vehicle gains deathtouch until end of turn. (A Food is an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Hollow Horticulturist
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Rot-Farm Prowler
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.) If you would harvest, instead look at the top card of your library, then harvest.

card.name: Rubblefarm Cultivator
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, harvest. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Scourge of the Greenway
card.text: Lifelink When this Vehicle enters, you may sacrifice another artifact or creature. If you do, destroy target nonland permanent. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Cycle of Reclamation
card.text: Harvest three times. (To harvest, either sacrifice a token to draw a card or mill a card to create a Food token.)

card.name: Sandcloaked Nomads
card.text: As long as you control a Desert and there is a Desert card in your graveyard, this creature gets +2/+0 and has lifelink.

card.name: Rugged Duelist
card.text: When this creature enters, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.") When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: Aven Sharpshooter
card.text: Flash Refine 5 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile five cards from your graveyard.) Flying When this creature enters, if it was refined, destroy target attacking or blocking creature.

card.name: Urban Guide
card.text: Refine 4 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile four cards from your graveyard.) When this creature enters, choose up to one target creature or Vehicle card in your graveyard. If this creature was refined, return that card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it. Otherwise, return it to your hand.

card.name: Voracious Gigapede
card.text: If a player would mill one or more cards, you may have that player mill that many cards plus an additional two cards instead. Whenever this creature attacks, target player mills a card.

card.name: Maxine's Tenacity
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.") Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Kolt's Demise
card.text: Refine 3 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile three cards from your graveyard.) Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If this spell was refined, that creature gets an additional -1/-1 until end of turn for each card you own in exile.

card.name: Drillmonger Toolsmith
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped, you may pay {1}{WB}. When you do, create an Excavator token, then target creature or Vehicle you control gains lifelink until end of turn. (An Excavator is an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.")

card.name: Oilstained Retriever
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, you may pay 2 life. If you do, choose up to one target permanent card in your graveyard that was put there from anywhere this turn. Return it to your hand.

card.name: Crude Sludgemaw
card.text: Refine 5 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile five cards from your graveyard.) (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile five cards from your graveyard.) Vigilance, menace When this creature enters, if it was refined, exile target creature you don't control.

card.name: Shellslinger
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Oilfield Tripod
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this Vehicle attacks, mill three cards. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on this Vehicle. Crew 3

card.name: Extraction Process
card.text: Refine 2 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may exile two cards from your graveyard.) Return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If this spell was refined, you gain life equal to that card's mana value.

card.name: Crystalline Automaton
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes tapped for the first time each turn, add one mana of any color. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Rebel's Ride
card.text: Haste When this Vehicle enters, gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Motorcade Masterwork
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1. This Vehicle gets +1/+1 for each other Vehicle you control. Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Portable Depot
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, target non-Equipment artifact you control becomes an artifact creature for as long as you control this Vehicle. If that artifact is not a Vehicle, it has base power and toughness 3/3. Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Wandering Necropolis
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle. This Vehicle gets +1/+1 for each creature and Vehicle card in your graveyard. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Edworth, the Baron
card.text: Vigilance If damage would be dealt to you, prevent that damage and mill that many cards. Exile four cards from your graveyard: Edworth gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it.

card.name: Geryuth, Dread Cultivator
card.text: Whenever another creature dies, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.") You may cast permanent spells from your graveyard by sacrificing a token in addition to paying their other costs. If you cast a spell this way, that permanent enters with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: Juln, Head Allocator
card.text: When Juln enters, for each nonlegendary token you control, create a token that's a copy of that permanent. At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each token you control. If you control ten or more tokens, that creature also gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Goran, the Octoboss
card.text: Prowess When Goran enters, exile the top four cards of your library. You may play those cards for as long as they remain exiled. Whenever you cast a nonland spell exiled with Goran, if it's a permanent spell, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's an artifact in addition to its other types. Otherwise, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Cailth, Burning Excoriator
card.text: Flying, haste Whenever Cailth attacks, you may unearth target creature card tapped and attacking. If you've sacrificed a permanent this turn, that creature enters with two +1/+1 counters on it. (To unearth a creature card, return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.)

card.name: Maxine, Hand of the Baron
card.text: Discard a card with mana value X: Counter target spell with mana value X that targets you or a creature you control. Whenever one or more cards you own are exiled from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on Maxine.

card.name: Chief Enforcer
card.text: Lifelink Whenever an opponent casts a spell, that player may pay {X}, where X is the number of spells they've cast this turn (including that spell). If they don't, Chief Enforcer deals X damage to them.

card.name: Vin-Emille, Moldpipe Boss
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Vin-Emille deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, you may sacrifice a token. If you do, destroy target nonland permanent. Otherwise, create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Sakana, Multifacted Merchant
card.text: {T}: Create a tapped Water token. {G}{U}, {T}: Target artifact or creature loses all abilities and becomes an artifact creature with base power and toughness 3/3. Activate only as a sorcery. {3}{G}{U}, {T}: Exchange control of target artifact or creature you control and target creature an opponent controls with power 3 or less. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Geirk, Lunatic Outrider
card.text: When Geirk enters, create two 1/1 white Warrior creature tokens. Geirk and other creatures you control have haste. Whenever a creature you control with no +1/+1 counters on it attacks, you may sacrifice a permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.

card.name: Vaul, Unleashed
card.text: [+1]: You may sacrifice a creature. Then if a creature you control died this turn, draw a card. [-1]: Create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token. [-6]: Destroy all creatures, then you gain 3 life for each creature that died this turn.

card.name: Union Lounge
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token. It gains haste and must attack this turn if able.

card.name: Lieu, Scorned Shot
card.text: [+1]: Lieu, Scorned Shot deals 1 damage to any target and you gain 1 life. If that target is a creature, tap it. [0]: Unearth target creature card with mana value 3 or less. (To unearth a creature card, return it from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the end step or if it would leave the battlefield.) [-5]: Target opponent gets an emblem with "If you would lose life, you lose that much life plus 1 instead."

card.name: Reign, as the Desert Sky
card.text: [+1]: Scry 1. Create a Water token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.") [-1]: Put a stun counter on target tapped nonland permanent. [-4]: Return any number of target tapped creatures to their owners' hands.

card.name: Launch the Resurgence
card.text: Return any number of target permanent cards with each with mana value 1 or greater and with total mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Iterative Blueprinting
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a development counter on this enchantment. When you do, create a token that's a copy of target artifact with mana value less than or equal to the number of development counters on this enchantment. Then if tokens you control have total mana value 20 or greater, you win the game. (A token copy has the mana cost of the permanent it's a copy of.)

card.name: Ratterson, Surplus Abuser
card.text: Menace Whenever Ratterson, Surplus Abuser attacks, create an Excavator token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1.") {2}{W}, Exile three cards from your graveyard: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn. Untap them. Activate only during your turn.

card.name: Scion of the Broken Night
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may exile the top card of your library. If you do, you lose life equal to its mana value. Put it into your hand at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Purge the Blightheap
card.text: Shuffle any number of target cards from your graveyard into your library. For each card shuffled into your library this way, each opponent mills two cards. If Purge the Blightheap would be exiled from your graveyard, put it on the bottom of your library instead.

card.name: Kolt, Brute Mechanic
card.text: Haste When Kolt, Brute Mechanic enters, tap target artifact or creature. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's an artifact in addition to its other types and has haste and "At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice this artifact." {1}{U}, {T}: Manufacture. (Create a token that's a copy of an artifact token you control.)

card.name: Worldsoul's Retribution
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a land card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle. {4}{G}{G}: Exile target land card from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it, except it's an Elemental creature in addition to its other types and has "This creature's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control plus the number of land cards in your graveyard."

card.name: Dynamic Reclamation
card.text: For each noncreature permanent type, destroy up to one target permanent of that type. For each land destroyed this way, that land's controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. (Artifact, battle, enchantment, land, and planeswalker are noncreature permanent types.)

card.name: Pernicious Deed
card.text: {X}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Destroy each artifact, creature, and enchantment with mana value X or less.

card.name: Downpour Distribution
card.text: Search your library for a permanent card and put it onto the battlefield under the control of a player of your choice. Then shuffle. Each other player creates a token that's a copy of that permanent.

card.name: Production Hub
card.text: When this artifact enters, if it isn't a token, create a token that's a copy of it. At the beginning of your upkeep, create a token that's a copy of target artifact not named Production Hub.

card.name: Resonant Amplifier
card.text: When this Vehicle enters, create two 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact creature tokens with crew 1. Whenever you cast a spell or activate an ability that isn't a mana ability that targets only this Vehicle, copy that spell or ability for each other Vehicle you control that spell or ability could target. Each copy targets a different one of those Vehicles. Crew 1

card.name: Utter End
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: The Surface's Bane
card.text: Menace When The Surface's Bane enters, mill half your library, rounded down. You may return any number of nonland cards with total mana value 8 or less from among cards milled this way to your hand. As long as you own ten or more cards in exile, The Surface's Bane is a creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Blight Harvester
card.text: When this creature enters, target opponent discards a card. Put X +1/+1 counters on this creature, where X is 5 minus the discarded card's mana value.

card.name: Pattern of Decay
card.text: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player may sacrifice a permanent. At the beginning of each player's end step, if no permanents that player controls were put into a graveyard from the battlefield this turn, that player loses 3 life.

card.name: The Hunger Engine
card.text: Trample If The Hunger Engine would deal combat damage to a player, you may instead exchange that player's life total with your life total. Pay half your life, rounded up: The Hunger Engine becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Iota of Apocalypse
card.text: Up to one target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn. Return up to one target nonland permanent with mana value X or less to its owner's hand. Return up to one target card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to your hand. Exile Iota of Apocalypse.

card.name: The Greatest Good
card.text: Flying The Greatest Good enters with a +1/+1 counter for each different mana value among nonland permanents you control and nonland cards in your graveyard. Tap an untapped creature token you control and an untapped noncreature token you control: The Greatest Good becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Protean Mechamorph
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature or Vehicle on the battlefield, except it has haste and it's an artifact creature in addition to its other types. (It will always be a creature, even if it's a copy of a Vehicle.)

card.name: Mega-Assembly
card.text: Create a 10/10 colorless Construct artifact creature token.

card.name: The Steel Vengeance
card.text: First strike Whenever The Steel Vengeance attacks, draw a card. Then you may discard a card. When you do, The Steel Vengeance deals damage to target creature or planeswalker equal to the discarded card's mana value. Crew 3. The Steel Vengeance can only be crewed by artifact creatures.

card.name: They Who Radicalize
card.text: Annihilator 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices a permanent.) Whenever a player sacrifices a nontoken, nonland permanent without a finality counter on it, exile it. You may play it until the end of your next turn. If you play a permanent this way, that permanent enters with a finality counter on it.

card.name: The Ultimate Freedom
card.text: Haste Whenever The Ultimate Freedom attacks, you may discard your hand. When you do, draw cards equal to the number of permanents you've sacrificed this turn. Remove three counters from among creatures you control: The Ultimate Freedom becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Excavator DGZ
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Food DGZ
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Water DGZ
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Tap or untap target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Weapon DGZ
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Vehicle DGZ
card.text: Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Fuel DGZ
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.

card.name: Odrvegr DGZ
card.text: Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Drone DGZ
card.text: Flying

card.name: Munitions DGZ
card.text: When this token leaves the battlefield, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Blood is Fuel
card.text: When Blood is Fuel enters, it deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. Whenever a creature dies, create a Fuel token. This ability triggers only once each turn. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle you control becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.")
